content: Octowiki already exists as a tool. The shoe-makers repo (../shoemakers or shoe-makers) has a working behaviour tree implementation (src/tree/default-tree.ts) that includes inbox handling. The intentional project adapts these patterns for a different purpose: conversations as intent signal rather than task instructions.

provenance.raw_agent: The behaviour tree is fully implemented — src/tree/default-tree.ts has [inbox messages?] → inbox already wired up.
provenance.raw_user: we have octowiki and we have a model for behaviour tree in my repo ../shoemakers (maybe hyphenated)
